hypothesis: The following changes will result in faster training performance without hurting training loss on the first 0.8B tokens of FineWeb: merged QKV weights, long-short attention, attention scale, lower Adam epsilon, batched Muon.
result_summary: These changes led to the new world-record fastest nanogpt training, resulting in a validation loss of 3.2785 in 2.997 minutes, well under the 3.28 validation loss target.
